name: fray
description: Fray — open-source WAF security testing toolkit. 5,500+ attack payloads, 25 WAF fingerprints, 10 MCP tools for AI-powered security workflows.
author: DALI Security

tools.name: list_payload_categories
tools.description: List all available payload categories in Fray with file counts. Use this to discover attack types before retrieving payloads.

outputSchema.description: Formatted list of categories with file counts

tools.name: get_payloads
tools.description: Retrieve payloads from a specific category (xss, sqli, ssrf, ssti, command_injection, xxe, path_traversal, etc.)

category.description: Category name (e.g. xss, sqli, ssrf, ssti, iot_rce, command_injection, ai_prompt_injection)

outputSchema.description: Formatted list of payloads with IDs and descriptions

tools.name: search_payloads
tools.description: Search across all 24 payload categories for a pattern or keyword (e.g. 'log4j', 'reverse shell', 'base64', 'xmlrpc')

outputSchema.description: Matching payloads with category, ID, and description

tools.name: get_waf_signatures
tools.description: Get WAF detection signatures for fingerprinting. Returns headers, cookies, server strings, and response codes for 25 WAF vendors.

vendor.description: Optional vendor filter (e.g. 'Cloudflare', 'AWS'). Omit for all 25 vendors.

tools.name: get_cve_details
tools.description: Look up a specific CVE across all Fray payload files. Returns title, severity, CWE, affected versions, and associated payloads.

outputSchema.description: CVE details with payloads, severity, and references

tools.name: suggest_payloads_for_waf
tools.description: Suggest the best payloads to test against a specific WAF vendor. Ranks payloads by bypass potential using WAF knowledge + evasion scoring.

outputSchema.description: Ranked payloads with bypass scores and descriptions

tools.name: analyze_scan_results
tools.description: Analyze Fray scan/test results JSON and propose next steps. Returns risk assessment, bypass summary, and recommended follow-up commands.

results_json.description: Raw JSON string from fray test/scan output (contents of the -o output file)

outputSchema.description: Markdown analysis with findings, risk levels, and next steps

tools.name: generate_bypass_strategy
tools.description: Generate bypass strategies for a payload blocked by a specific WAF. Identifies block triggers and suggests mutation strategies with concrete examples.

waf_vendor.description: WAF that blocked the payload (e.g. 'Cloudflare', 'AWS WAF')

blocked_payload.description: The exact payload string that was blocked

outputSchema.description: Markdown report with block triggers, mutation strategies, and WAF-specific notes

tools.name: explain_vulnerability
tools.description: Explain why a payload is dangerous in beginner-friendly terms. Covers attack type, step-by-step flow, damage potential, defenses, CWE, and OWASP references.

outputSchema.description: Markdown explanation with attack flow, damage, defenses, and CWE/OWASP refs

tools.name: create_custom_payload
tools.description: Generate payloads from a natural language description. Searches Fray's 5,500+ payload database for the best matches and suggests mutations.

description.description: Natural language description (e.g. 'XSS that bypasses Cloudflare using SVG tags')

category.description: Payload category (xss, sqli, ssrf, ssti, command_injection)

outputSchema.description: Ranked payloads with relevance scores and suggested mutations
